'''Docking Bay 35''' was one of the many docking bays in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was there that a group of future [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] met [[Sithless Leethe]] when he was trying to sell the ''[[Limping Lady]]''. They arranged to meet with him in a [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Mos Eisley cantina]] to finalize the deal, and would later return to take the ship. However, by the time they got back, the ''Lady'' had been impounded by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] in the docking bay. They somehow managed to get past the group of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] who were guarding it, and blasted off without permission.<ref name="Limping Lady" />
